case_title: CARL CLAYVON CURRY VS. JARED RUDOLPH ET AL

docket_entries.description: LAW AND MOTION 302, MOTION - DISCUSSED. AT CONCLUSION OF DISCUSSION, THE COURT GRANTS THE MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD. ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-16-2024 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Notice having been given and there being no appearance or objection filed, the Court orders the case dismissed pursuant to Government Code Section 68608(b). Judge: ANNE-CHRISTINE MASSULLO; Clerk: G. Gonzales; Proceedings not reported. (610)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar May-14-2024 Continued To Jul-16-24 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Self-represented Plaintiff is sanctioned $400.00 for failure to appear. The Order to Show Cause is re-set to July 16, 2024, at 10:30am in Department 610. Judge: Samuel K. Feng; Clerk: M. Macadangdang; Proceedings not reported. (610)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-13-2023 Continued To Jan-10-24 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
Off Calendar Jul-24-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances (via Zoom):

Ani Megerdichian, Esq., JT LEGAL GROUP, APC, (818) 797-7900, for Plaintiff.

RE: Plaintiff CARL CURRY's MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD.

Motion - DISCUSSED. Counsel confirms that the Plaintiff has been unresponsive for some time now. At conclusion of discussion, the court grants the Motion for Withdrawal of Attorney of Record.

Counsel is to prepare and submit a proposed order on the mandatory Judicial Council form.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr. Clerk: Robert Woods. Not reported. (302/RBU)
